body:
Here at Your Green Guys it's not just about you. We take it a step further to look out for those that don't have a voice as well. Our Green Mission is a standard we've set that holds us accountable for proper disposal of wastes and encouraging more sustainable products. We do this to stop chemicals and trash being washed into our streams. This helps prevent pollution and harm to vegetation and marine/wildlife.

**We offer a 10% service discount for all active & retired military service members. Thank you for your service!**
